proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_midostaurin=1 have a higher objective_response rate than those with treatment_midostaurin=0.
Patients receiving treatment_gilteritinib=1 have a higher objective_response rate than those with treatment_gilteritinib=0.
Patients receiving treatment_ivosidenib=1 have a higher objective_response rate than those with treatment_ivosidenib=0.
Patients receiving treatment_enasidenib=1 have a higher objective_response rate than those with treatment_enasidenib=0.
Patients receiving treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1 have a higher objective_response rate than those with treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=0.
Patients receiving treatment_7plus3=1 have a higher objective_response rate than those with treatment_7plus3=0.

analyses.result_summary: ORR on treatment_midostaurin: 0.169 (n=7545); off: 0.169 (n=42455); OR=0.996, chi-square p=0.923.
ORR on treatment_gilteritinib: 0.163 (n=7545); off: 0.170 (n=42455); OR=0.950, chi-square p=0.134.
ORR on treatment_ivosidenib: 0.171 (n=3938); off: 0.169 (n=46062); OR=1.014, chi-square p=0.763.
ORR on treatment_enasidenib: 0.161 (n=3972); off: 0.170 (n=46028); OR=0.940, chi-square p=0.172.
ORR on treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine: 0.173 (n=20020); off: 0.166 (n=29980); OR=1.054, chi-square p=0.031.
ORR on treatment_7plus3: 0.170 (n=22580); off: 0.168 (n=27420); OR=1.015, chi-square p=0.540.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Objective response rate is different in patients with flt3_itd=1 than in those with flt3_itd=0.
Objective response rate is different in patients with flt3_tkd=1 than in those with flt3_tkd=0.
Objective response rate is different in patients with idh1_mutation=1 than in those with idh1_mutation=0.
Objective response rate is different in patients with idh2_mutation=1 than in those with idh2_mutation=0.
Objective response rate is different in patients with npm1_mutation=1 than in those with npm1_mutation=0.
Objective response rate is lower in patients with tp53_mutation=1 than in those with tp53_mutation=0.
Objective response rate is lower in patients with complex_karyotype=1 than in those with complex_karyotype=0.
Objective response rate is lower in patients with secondary_aml=1 than in those with secondary_aml=0.

analyses.result_summary: ORR with complex_karyotype=1: 0.168 (n=7462); =0: 0.169 (n=42538); OR=0.992, chi-square p=0.818.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Midostaurin increases ORR more in flt3_itd=1 patients than in flt3_itd=0 patients (positive interaction on log-OR scale).
Gilteritinib increases ORR more in flt3_itd=1 patients than in flt3_itd=0 patients.
Gilteritinib increases ORR more in flt3_tkd=1 patients than in flt3_tkd=0 patients.
Ivosidenib increases ORR more in idh1_mutation=1 patients than in idh1_mutation=0 patients.
Enasidenib increases ORR more in idh2_mutation=1 patients than in idh2_mutation=0 patients.

analyses.result_summary: Stratified ORRs — flt3_itd=1: treatment_midostaurin=1 0.161 vs =0 0.174 (Δ=-0.012); flt3_itd=0: treatment_midostaurin=1 0.170 vs =0 0.168 (Δ=+0.002). Logistic interaction coef (log-OR) = -0.105, p=0.219.

Stratified ORRs — flt3_itd=1: treatment_gilteritinib=1 0.169 vs =0 0.172 (Δ=-0.003); flt3_itd=0: treatment_gilteritinib=1 0.162 vs =0 0.170 (Δ=-0.008). Logistic interaction coef (log-OR) = 0.034, p=0.686.

Stratified ORRs — flt3_tkd=1: treatment_gilteritinib=1 0.141 vs =0 0.166 (Δ=-0.025); flt3_tkd=0: treatment_gilteritinib=1 0.164 vs =0 0.170 (Δ=-0.006). Logistic interaction coef (log-OR) = -0.152, p=0.327.

Stratified ORRs — idh1_mutation=1: treatment_ivosidenib=1 0.174 vs =0 0.225 (Δ=-0.051); idh1_mutation=0: treatment_ivosidenib=1 0.171 vs =0 0.164 (Δ=+0.006). Logistic interaction coef (log-OR) = -0.364, p=0.027.

Stratified ORRs — idh2_mutation=1: treatment_enasidenib=1 0.144 vs =0 0.167 (Δ=-0.023); idh2_mutation=0: treatment_enasidenib=1 0.163 vs =0 0.170 (Δ=-0.007). Logistic interaction coef (log-OR) = -0.124, p=0.448.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Venetoclax+azacitidine produces a larger absolute ORR benefit in unfit_for_intensive=1 patients than in unfit_for_intensive=0 patients.
7+3 induction produces a larger absolute ORR benefit in unfit_for_intensive=0 patients than in unfit_for_intensive=1 patients.

analyses.result_summary: ORR by (unfit_for_intensive,treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine): unfit & tx 0.179; unfit & no-tx 0.163; fit & tx 0.170; fit & no-tx 0.168. Interaction log-OR=0.104, p=0.036.
ORR by (unfit_for_intensive,treatment_7plus3): unfit & tx 0.169; unfit & no-tx 0.170; fit & tx 0.171; fit & no-tx 0.167. Interaction log-OR=-0.033, p=0.502.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Older age_years is associated with lower probability of objective_response.
Higher ecog_ps is associated with lower probability of objective_response.
sex_female=1 is associated with a different objective_response rate than sex_female=0.

analyses.result_summary: Univariable logistic regression of objective_response on age_years: coef (log-OR) = 0.0004, p=0.718.
Univariable logistic regression of objective_response on ecog_ps: coef (log-OR) = -0.3837, p=0.000.
Univariable logistic regression of objective_response on sex_female: coef (log-OR) = 0.0238, p=0.320.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher wbc_k_per_ul is associated with lower ORR.
Higher blast_pct_marrow is associated with lower ORR.
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with lower ORR.
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with higher ORR.
Patients with both tp53_mutation=1 and complex_karyotype=1 have a lower ORR than patients with both =0.
tp53_mutation=1 patients have a smaller (or negative) ORR benefit from treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine than tp53_mutation=0 patients (negative interaction).

analyses.code: chi2_contingency on TP53+CK both vs neither

analyses.result_summary: VEN/AZA effect: TP53+ Δ=-0.004; TP53- Δ=+0.009; interaction log-OR=-0.087, p=0.285.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within flt3_itd=0 patients, npm1_mutation=1 has a higher ORR than npm1_mutation=0.
The favorable effect of npm1_mutation on ORR is attenuated when flt3_itd=1 (negative npm1_mutation × flt3_itd interaction).
secondary_aml=1 is associated with lower ORR than secondary_aml=0.
More prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with lower ORR.
prior_chemotherapy=1 is associated with lower ORR.

analyses.result_summary: ORR sAML 0.169 vs de novo 0.169; OR=0.997, p=0.915.
ORR prior chemo 0.168 vs none 0.170; OR=0.987, p=0.596.

proposed_hypotheses.text: heart_failure=1 is associated with lower ORR.
chronic_kidney_disease=1 is associated with lower ORR.
diabetes_mellitus=1 is associated with lower ORR.
copd=1 is associated with lower ORR.
ORR differs across race_ethnicity categories (overall test).
Patients with insurance_type='medicaid' have a different ORR than insurance_type='private'.
Patients with insurance_type='uninsured' have a lower ORR than insurance_type='private'.
rural_residence=1 is associated with lower ORR.

analyses.result_summary: ORR medicaid 0.169 vs private 0.167; coef=0.016, p=0.677.
ORR uninsured 0.166 vs private 0.167; coef=-0.003, p=0.966.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for age_years, ecog_ps, secondary_aml, complex_karyotype, tp53_mutation, npm1_mutation and treatment_ivosidenib, idh1_mutation remains positively associated with ORR.
The IDH1 ORR advantage is attenuated by treatment_ivosidenib (negative idh1_mutation × treatment_ivosidenib interaction).

analyses.code: smf.logit('objective_response ~ idh1_mutation + age_years + ecog_ps + secondary_aml + complex_karyotype + tp53_mutation + npm1_mutation + treatment_ivosidenib', data=df).fit()

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within patients with treatment_ivosidenib=0, idh1_mutation=1 still has higher ORR than idh1_mutation=0.
Within patients with treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1, idh1_mutation=1 has higher ORR than idh1_mutation=0.
A composite adverse-risk profile (tp53_mutation=1 OR complex_karyotype=1 OR secondary_aml=1) is associated with lower ORR than absence of all three.
Patients with age_years≥75 AND ecog_ps≥2 have a lower ORR than patients with age_years<75 AND ecog_ps<2.
In this AML cohort, ca_125_u_ml is uncorrelated with objective_response (negative-control marker).
In this AML cohort, cea_ng_ml is uncorrelated with objective_response (negative-control marker).
In this AML cohort, psa_ng_ml is uncorrelated with objective_response (negative-control marker).
Allele-dose at snp_rs1045642 is associated with objective_response (additive logistic test).
Allele-dose at snp_rs4244285 is associated with objective_response (additive logistic test).
Allele-dose at snp_rs1801133 is associated with objective_response (additive logistic test).
Allele-dose at snp_rs1800629 is associated with objective_response (additive logistic test).
Allele-dose at snp_rs429358 is associated with objective_response (additive logistic test).
Allele-dose at snp_rs7412 is associated with objective_response (additive logistic test).
Allele-dose at snp_rs1799983 is associated with objective_response (additive logistic test).
Allele-dose at snp_rs4880 is associated with objective_response (additive logistic test).
Allele-dose at snp_rs1050828 is associated with objective_response (additive logistic test).

In a multivariable logistic model with age_years, ecog_ps, secondary_aml, complex_karyotype, tp53_mutation, npm1_mutation, flt3_itd, idh1_mutation, idh2_mutation, wbc_k_per_ul, blast_pct_marrow and albumin_g_dl, idh1_mutation remains an independent positive predictor of objective_response.

analyses.code: smf.logit('objective_response ~ age_years + ecog_ps + secondary_aml + complex_karyotype + tp53_mutation + npm1_mutation + flt3_itd + idh1_mutation + idh2_mutation + wbc_k_per_ul + blast_pct_marrow + albumin_g_dl', data=df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Multivariable model: idh1_mutation log-OR=0.360 (p=0.000). Other coefs: age_years=0.000(p=0.717), ecog_ps=-0.384(p=0.000), secondary_aml=-0.001(p=0.965), complex_karyotype=-0.016(p=0.635), tp53_mutation=-0.031(p=0.447), npm1_mutation=0.044(p=0.089), flt3_itd=0.020(p=0.494), idh1_mutation=0.360(p=0.000), idh2_mutation=-0.003(p=0.952), wbc_k_per_ul=-0.002(p=0.000), blast_pct_marrow=-0.006(p=0.000), albumin_g_dl=0.118(p=0.000)

proposed_hypotheses.text: IDH1 ORR advantage is similar across complex_karyotype subgroups (no idh1_mutation × complex_karyotype interaction).
IDH1 ORR advantage is similar across tp53_mutation subgroups (no idh1_mutation × tp53_mutation interaction).
IDH1 ORR advantage is similar across age strata <70 vs ≥70 (no idh1_mutation × age_ge70 interaction).
Higher fatigue_grade is associated with lower ORR.
Higher pain_nrs is associated with lower ORR.
Higher dyspnea_grade is associated with lower ORR.
Higher appetite_loss_grade is associated with lower ORR.
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with lower ORR.
A composite cachectic phenotype (weight_loss_pct_6mo>5 AND albumin_g_dl<3.5) has a lower ORR than its complement.
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with lower ORR.
Higher nlr (neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio) is associated with lower ORR.
Patients with treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1 are older on average (age_years) than treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=0 patients.
Patients with treatment_7plus3=1 are younger on average (age_years) than treatment_7plus3=0 patients.
Patients with flt3_itd=1 receive treatment_midostaurin at a higher rate than flt3_itd=0 patients.

analyses.result_summary: Mean age VEN/AZA on - off = +0.11 y; Welch t-test p=0.254.
Mean age 7+3 on - off = +0.10 y; Welch t-test p=0.284.
P(midostaurin | FLT3-ITD+) = 0.147; P(midostaurin | FLT3-ITD-) = 0.152; chi2 p=0.206.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for age_years, ecog_ps, secondary_aml, idh1_mutation, npm1_mutation and flt3_itd, tp53_mutation is associated with lower ORR.
After the same adjustment, complex_karyotype is associated with lower ORR.

analyses.code: smf.logit('objective_response ~ tp53_mutation + complex_karyotype + age_years + ecog_ps + secondary_aml + idh1_mutation + npm1_mutation + flt3_itd', data=df).fit()
smf.logit('objective_response ~ tp53_mutation + complex_karyotype + age_years + ecog_ps + secondary_aml + idh1_mutation + npm1_mutation + flt3_itd', data=df).fit()

proposed_hypotheses.text: The covariate-adjusted absolute ORR difference between idh1_mutation=1 and idh1_mutation=0 patients is positive (idh1_mutation=1 higher) by g-computation across age, ecog, mutational and treatment covariates.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted mean predicted ORR: idh1=1 0.220, idh1=0 0.165, adjusted Δ=+0.055; coef p=0.000.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Across the full SNP panel, no individual SNP is associated with objective_response after Bonferroni correction at alpha=0.05/(number of SNPs).

analyses.code: for snp in snps: smf.logit(f'objective_response ~ {snp}', data=df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: 24 SNPs tested; minimum unadjusted p=0.0053 (snp_rs1050828); 2 below 0.05 unadjusted; 0 survive Bonferroni at 0.05/24=0.0021.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for age_years, ecog_ps, race_ethnicity, secondary_aml, complex_karyotype, tp53_mutation and unfit_for_intensive, treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine is associated with higher ORR.
After the same adjustment, treatment_7plus3 is associated with higher ORR.

analyses.code: smf.logit('objective_response ~ treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine + treatment_7plus3 + age_years + ecog_ps + C(race_ethnicity) + secondary_aml + complex_karyotype + tp53_mutation + unfit_for_intensive', data=df).fit()

smf.logit('objective_response ~ treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine + treatment_7plus3 + age_years + ecog_ps + C(race_ethnicity) + secondary_aml + complex_karyotype + tp53_mutation + unfit_for_intensive', data=df).fit()
